G

getCdfFile routine in spdfcdaswsexample.pro

This procedure demonstrates how to obtain a local copy of a remote CDF file and display some CDF information about the file's contents.

getDataResults routine in spdfcdaswsexample.pro

This procedure demonstrates how to examine the result of a data request.

getFile routine in spdfcdaswsexample.pro

This procedure demonstrates how to check the MIME-type of an SpdfFileDescription and, if it is of type "image/png", to get a local copy and display the image.

getResultFile routine in spdfcdaswsexample.pro

This procedure demonstrates how to examine an SpdfFileDescription and then display it based upon it MIME-type.

getTextFile routine in spdfcdaswsexample.pro

This procedure demonstrates how to obtain a local copy of a remote text file and display a portion of its contents.

SpdfGetData routine in spdfgetdata.pro

This function gets data from NASA's Space Physics Data Facility Coordinated Data Analysis System and returns it in a CDAWlib structure..

spdfgetdata.pro .pro file in ./ directory

This file contains a procedure-oriented wrapper that integrates functionality from the SpdfCdas class (IDL client interface to Coordinated Data Analysis System Web Services (CDAS WSs)) and the CDAWlib library.

This function is an example of a callback_function for the spdfGetData function.

spdfhttperrorreporter__define.pro .pro file in ./ directory

This class represents an object that is used to report HTTP errors.
Notes:

  1. This class exists in both the CDAS and SSC web service IDL libraries.
